name: Dough for Deep Dish Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 425 degrees Fahrenheit.
2. Dissolve the yeast in warm water (105-115 degrees).
3. Combine flour and salt in a bowl.
4. Add the yeast mixture and olive oil.
5. Mix thoroughly.
6. Turn dough onto a well floured board.
7. Knead until smooth (about 10 minutes).
8. Place in a greased bowl and let rise until doubled (about 1 hour).
9. Punch down the dough.
10. Roll out to a thickness of 2 inches.
11. Place in an oiled deep dish pizza pan or oven-proof round pan (14 inches or so in diameter), pushing the dough up and above the sides.
12. Brush generously with olive oil.
13. Add sauce, seasoning, and toppings up to but not onto the dough on the sides of the pan.
14. Bake until cheese is bubbly and crust is golden. Serve hot.
